---
title: "validate_date_range"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `validate_date_range()`

Validate Date Ranges for API Compatibility

## Usage

```r
validate_date_range(
  start_date,
  end_date,
  start_date_wday_abb,
  range_length = 7
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `start_date` | Date/Character. |
| `end_date` | Date/Character. |
| `start_date_wday_abb` | Character. Three-letter weekday abbreviation (e.g., "mon"). |
| `range_length` | Integer. Expected number of days in the range. Default is 7. |

## Value

Logical 'TRUE' if valid, otherwise aborts with a 'cli' error.

## Description

Ensures that the provided start and end dates meet specific API requirements
(e.g., starting on a Monday for weekly views).
